calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

David Francis Perry, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NEW ASIA FOOD, VINH Q. TRINH, aka VINH TRINH.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $51,047.83
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $51,047.83
Judgment signed in open court.
